  Thanks for contributing to Commons! Fill in the sections below.
  Keep it honest — a clear PR is easier to review and safer to merge.

## Summary

<!-- One or two sentences: what does this change do, and why does it matter? -->

Closes #

## What changed

<!-- The concrete changes, as bullets — help the reviewer see the shape fast. -->

-

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (alters existing behavior or data)
- [ ] Documentation / tooling / chore

## How this was tested

<!-- How did you verify it works? Commands run, cases covered, manual steps.
     If it isn't tested, say so and why. -->

## Notes for reviewers

<!-- Anything worth flagging: tradeoffs, risks, things you're unsure about,
     or follow-ups you deliberately left out. Delete if there's nothing. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] I have read [`CONTRIBUTING.md`](../CONTRIBUTING.md).
- [ ] I agree to the [Contributor License Agreement](../CLA.md) and have added my name to it (first PR only).
- [ ] My commits are signed off (`git commit -s`).
- [ ] Core stays vertical-neutral (no audience-specific behavior leaked into the engine).
- [ ] I did not hard-delete historical data; comments explain *why*, not *what*.
- [ ] I updated docs/comments where behavior changed.
